Event: Clans Game
Event Date: 30/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: O47
Tech Weaver Orb

Once in a while, the orb's owner puts magic marks upon a random allied unit and a random enemy unit. When the marked enemy unit receives 400000 damage, the mark is removed; that unit and all enemy units in a large radius are afflicted with improved withering. 4 random positive effects are removed from them, and all of their stats are reduced by 40% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 2 times. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 40% of their maximum health. When the marked allied unit receives 400000 damage, the mark is removed; improved restoration is cast upon that unit and all allied units in a large radius. 4 random negative effects are removed from the targets, and they restore 40% health. All of their stats are increased by 40% for 5 sec. as well. Stacks up to 2 times. Each unit may only have one mark upon them.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Event: Clans Game

Event date: 30/06/2026

Sage bot code: O47
